analysis: Agent Interaction Model — Fleet Beta Squad 7

talks_to: system_brain (read agent_states, corrections, learnings, health; write state, health, corrections, learnings)
event_bus (peek_events for context, publish_event for nexus_alert/nexus_event)
feedback_loop (run_feedback_cycle for trading weights, DSCR priorities)
telegram (send notifications to Marc — rate-limited, max 5/cycle)
agents.kill_switch: NEXUS_DISABLED env var or system_brain health nexus=down

talks_to: system_brain (report_state, report_health, check_health, record_learning, get_unhealthy, record_correction, verify_correction, lookup_correction)
task_dispatcher (via task_mcp_server MCP tools: get_next, submit, complete, fail, delegate)
fabric (writes openclaw-task-*.md entries on cron completion)
task_dispatcher (via task_mcp_server MCP: task_get_next, task_complete, task_fail, task_delegate)
system_brain (get_briefing before work, report_state after work)
telegram (bidirectional: receives user commands, sends responses)

channels.protocol: JSON files with timestamped versions + latest symlink (atomic via os.rename), legacy /tmp fallback, auto-prune to 48 versions
SQLite WAL, events + consumers + subscriptions tables, TTL 2h default, priority 0-2, consume-once per consumer

consumers: all agents via recall() and recall_for_task()
channels.protocol: Write to JSONL log + ChromaDB + event_bus + optional Obsidian vault; read via semantic search or keyword fallback
Markdown files with YAML frontmatter. Types: handoff, task, decision. Tiers: hot (active), cold (archived). Naming: {agent}-{type}-{timestamp}-{hex}.md
Auto-routing: code->claude_code, execute->openclaw, research->hermes. Priority 0-3. Statuses: submitted, assigned, in_progress, completed, failed. Delegation creates parent-child task links.
Rate limited: nexus max 5/cycle, 1 per topic per 6h. Hermes bidirectional.
Tag-based trails with strength, decay over time, cluster detection triggers coordinated actions

interaction_risks.risk: nexus reads stale data_bus if previous agent crashed mid-write (symlink points to incomplete JSON)
interaction_risks.mitigation: data_bus uses atomic os.rename for symlink updates, but versioned file write itself is not atomic

interaction_risks.risk: system_brain SQLite concurrent writes can timeout (5s) if nexus and coordinator run simultaneously
interaction_risks.mitigation: WAL journal mode helps, but both agents write to agent_state, health, corrections tables every cycle

interaction_risks.risk: openclaw.json corruption causes cascading failures across task_executor, dscr_lead_gen_cron, data pipelines — observed recurring 2026-03-31 through 2026-04-01
interaction_risks.mitigation: Multiple nexus handoffs escalated to claude_code; root cause was multi-process writes without file locking

interaction_risks.risk: event_bus events expire after 2h TTL — if consumer agent is down for >2h, events are lost
interaction_risks.mitigation: peek_events does not consume, but consume_events marks as consumed; no retry queue for expired events

interaction_risks.risk: shared_memory ChromaDB server at localhost:8100 may be down — falls back to local JSONL keyword search (lower quality)
interaction_risks.mitigation: Graceful fallback exists, but semantic search quality degrades to simple keyword matching

interaction_risks.risk: nexus auto_debug can get stuck on the same error for days (observed: glint_monitor KeyError 'salary' stuck for 1887 minutes)
interaction_risks.mitigation: nexus eventually creates handoff to claude_code, but the delay means prolonged component downtime

interaction_risks.risk: self_healer exhausts strategies and escalates to human via fabric handoff — but no human reads fabric handoffs in real-time
interaction_risks.mitigation: Handoffs pile up in fabric/ with status=open; nexus should consume and re-route but may miss them

interaction_risks.risk: daily task limit (50) could be exhausted by nexus submitting repetitive tasks for the same unresolved issue
interaction_risks.mitigation: nexus checks task_dashboard for duplicates, but similarity matching is imperfect

interaction_risks.risk: feedback_loop modifies trading weights and DSCR priorities every nexus cycle — no rollback if changes are harmful
interaction_risks.mitigation: No versioning of outcome_config.json changes; feedback_loop changes are immediately live
